query:
-- SOCIAL STUDIES-1: History & Government (15 questions)
INSERT INTO bridge_academy_practice_questions (topicId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation, difficulty, variationGroup) VALUES
(8, 'Who was the first President of the United States?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Thomas Jefferson\", \"George Washington\", \"John Adams\", \"Benjamin Franklin\"]', 'George Washington', 'George Washington served as president from 1789-1797', 'easy', 'topic_8_group_0'),
(8, 'What year did the United States declare independence?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"1775\", \"1776\", \"1783\", \"1789\"]', '1776', 'The Declaration of Independence was signed on July 4, 1776', 'easy', 'topic_8_group_0'),
(8, 'What is the Constitution?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A law\", \"Framework for government\", \"A treaty\", \"A declaration\"]', 'Framework for government', 'The Constitution is the framework for U.S. government', 'medium', 'topic_8_group_1'),
(8, 'What is an amendment?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A law\", \"Official change to Constitution\", \"A court decision\", \"A bill\"]', 'Official change to Constitution', 'An amendment is an official change to the Constitution', 'medium', 'topic_8_group_1'),
(8, 'What does due process mean?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Quick justice\", \"Fair legal procedures\", \"Punishment\", \"Trial\"]', 'Fair legal procedures', 'Due process ensures fair treatment under the law', 'hard', 'topic_8_group_2'),
(8, 'What is the purpose of political parties?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Create laws\", \"Organize political groups\", \"Run courts\", \"Enforce laws\"]', 'Organize political groups', 'Political parties organize people around shared beliefs', 'medium', 'topic_8_group_2'),
(8, 'What are the three branches of government?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Executive, Legislative, Judicial\", \"Senate, House, Court\", \"President, Congress, Supreme Court\", \"Federal, State, Local\"]', 'Executive, Legislative, Judicial', 'These three branches provide checks and balances', 'medium', 'topic_8_group_3'),
(8, 'What is the role of the Senate?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Pass laws\", \"Upper house of Congress\", \"Enforce laws\", \"Interpret laws\"]', 'Upper house of Congress', 'The Senate is one of two chambers of Congress', 'medium', 'topic_8_group_3'),
(8, 'What is the Bill of Rights?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"First 10 amendments\", \"List of citizen rights\", \"Constitutional protections\", \"All of the above\"]', 'All of the above', 'The Bill of Rights protects fundamental freedoms', 'medium', 'topic_8_group_4'),
(8, 'What is the function of the Supreme Court?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Pass laws\", \"Interpret the Constitution\", \"Enforce laws\", \"Elect the president\"]', 'Interpret the Constitution', 'The Supreme Court is the highest court in the land', 'hard', 'topic_8_group_4'),
(8, 'What caused the American Civil War?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Taxes\", \"Slavery and states rights\", \"Trade disputes\", \"British invasion\"]', 'Slavery and states rights', 'The Civil War was fought over slavery and state sovereignty', 'hard', 'topic_8_group_5'),
(8, 'What is the Magna Carta?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A U.S. document\", \"English document limiting royal power\", \"A treaty\", \"A law\"]', 'English document limiting royal power', 'The Magna Carta was a foundation for constitutional government', 'hard', 'topic_8_group_5'),
(8, 'What is the Electoral College?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A school\", \"System for electing the president\", \"A voting method\", \"A political party\"]', 'System for electing the president', 'The Electoral College determines the U.S. president', 'hard', 'topic_8_group_6'),
(8, 'What is a veto?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A law\", \"Power to reject a bill\", \"A vote\", \"A court decision\"]', 'Power to reject a bill', 'The president can veto legislation from Congress', 'medium', 'topic_8_group_6'),
(8, 'What is impeachment?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Removal from office\", \"Formal charge of wrongdoing\", \"A trial\", \"A punishment\"]', 'Formal charge of wrongdoing', 'Impeachment is the process of bringing charges', 'hard', 'topic_8_group_7');

-- SOCIAL STUDIES-2: Civics & Culture (15 questions)
INSERT INTO bridge_academy_practice_questions (topicId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation, difficulty, variationGroup) VALUES
(9, 'What is a citizen?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A resident\", \"A person with legal membership in a country\", \"A voter\", \"A taxpayer\"]', 'A person with legal membership in a country', 'Citizens have rights and responsibilities', 'easy', 'topic_9_group_0'),
(9, 'What is the purpose of voting?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Make money\", \"Participate in government\", \"Pay taxes\", \"Serve in military\"]', 'Participate in government', 'Voting is a fundamental democratic right', 'easy', 'topic_9_group_0'),
(9, 'What is a jury?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A judge\", \"Group of citizens who decide guilt or innocence\", \"A lawyer\", \"A court\"]', 'Group of citizens who decide guilt or innocence', 'Jury duty is a civic responsibility', 'medium', 'topic_9_group_1'),
(9, 'What is the purpose of taxes?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Punishment\", \"Fund government services\", \"Pay politicians\", \"Reduce spending\"]', 'Fund government services', 'Taxes support public infrastructure and services', 'medium', 'topic_9_group_1'),
(9, 'What is freedom of speech?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Say anything\", \"Right to express ideas\", \"No restrictions\", \"Only in public\"]', 'Right to express ideas', 'Freedom of speech is protected by the First Amendment', 'medium', 'topic_9_group_2'),
(9, 'What is the purpose of the United Nations?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Make laws\", \"Promote peace and cooperation\", \"Control countries\", \"Military force\"]', 'Promote peace and cooperation', 'The UN works to resolve international conflicts', 'medium', 'topic_9_group_2'),
(9, 'What is a democracy?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Rule by one\", \"Government by the people\", \"Rule by few\", \"Military rule\"]', 'Government by the people', 'Democracy emphasizes citizen participation', 'easy', 'topic_9_group_3'),
(9, 'What is a dictatorship?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Democracy\", \"Rule by one person with absolute power\", \"Rule by many\", \"Rule by elected officials\"]', 'Rule by one person with absolute power', 'Dictatorships lack democratic freedoms', 'medium', 'topic_9_group_3'),
(9, 'What is the purpose of the judicial system?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Make laws\", \"Enforce laws\", \"Interpret laws and administer justice\", \"Collect taxes\"]', 'Interpret laws and administer justice', 'The judicial system ensures fair trials', 'medium', 'topic_9_group_4'),
(9, 'What is a right?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A privilege\", \"Something you are allowed to do\", \"A responsibility\", \"A law\"]', 'Something you are allowed to do', 'Rights are protections guaranteed to citizens', 'easy', 'topic_9_group_4'),
(9, 'What is a responsibility?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A right\", \"Something you should do\", \"A privilege\", \"A law\"]', 'Something you should do', 'Responsibilities are duties citizens should fulfill', 'easy', 'topic_9_group_5'),
(9, 'What is the purpose of laws?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Punish people\", \"Protect rights and maintain order\", \"Control behavior\", \"Collect taxes\"]', 'Protect rights and maintain order', 'Laws create a framework for society', 'medium', 'topic_9_group_5'),
(9, 'What is a treaty?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A law\", \"Agreement between countries\", \"A declaration\", \"A vote\"]', 'Agreement between countries', 'Treaties formalize international agreements', 'medium', 'topic_9_group_6'),
(9, 'What is diplomacy?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"War\", \"Peaceful negotiation between countries\", \"Trade\", \"Military alliance\"]', 'Peaceful negotiation between countries', 'Diplomacy resolves conflicts without violence', 'medium', 'topic_9_group_6'),
(9, 'What is the purpose of the Red Cross?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Political organization\", \"Humanitarian aid and disaster relief\", \"Military force\", \"Government agency\"]', 'Humanitarian aid and disaster relief', 'The Red Cross provides emergency assistance', 'medium', 'topic_9_group_7');
